name: QR Code MFA Setup
description: Quishing email asking the user to scan a QR code to set up MFA on their mobile.
subject: Scan to complete MFA enrollment - {{.OrgName}}
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

As part of {{.OrgName}}'s zero-trust security initiative, all employees are required to enable multi-factor authentication on their corporate accounts.

To complete the setup:
1. Open the link below on your mobile device
2. Scan the QR code with your authenticator app
3. Enter the 6-digit code to verify

MFA setup: {{.URL}}

Deadline: {{.Date}}

If you do not complete MFA enrollment by the deadline, your account will be restricted from accessing email and cloud services until setup is complete.

{{.OrgName}} IT Security
html:
{{if .OrgLogo}}{{else}}

{{.OrgName}}

{{end}}

🔒 Multi-Factor Authentication Setup

Hi {{.FirstName}},

As part of {{.OrgName}}'s zero-trust security initiative, all employees are required to enable multi-factor authentication on their corporate accounts.

■▫■
Scan with your authenticator app
  1. Open the link below on your mobile device
  2. Scan the QR code with your authenticator app
  3. Enter the 6-digit code to verify

Complete MFA Setup

Deadline: {{.Date}}. If you do not enroll by this date, your account will be restricted from accessing email and cloud services.
{{.OrgName}} IT Security
{{.Tracker}}

name: Parking Violation Scan to Pay
description: Parking violation quishing email with scan-to-pay QR code.
subject: Parking violation notice - Citation #PKV-9384756
text:
CITY PARKING VIOLATION NOTICE

Citation number: PKV-9384756
Violation: Expired meter
Location: 500 Main Street
Amount due: $65.00
Due date: {{.Date}}

Scan the QR code or visit the link to pay your citation:
{{.URL}}

Citations not paid within 15 days will incur a $25 late fee. After 30 days, a hold will be placed on your vehicle registration.

City Parking Authority
html:
PARKING VIOLATION

Citation number: PKV-9384756
Violation: Expired meter
Location: 500 Main Street
Amount due: $65.00
Due date: {{.Date}}
■▫■
Scan to pay

PAY CITATION

Citations not paid within 15 days will incur a $25 late fee. After 30 days, a hold will be placed on your vehicle registration.

{{.URL}}

Pre-ordering saves time and guarantees ingredient availability for your visit.

See you soon!
Bella's Italian Kitchen

name: Package Delivery QR Redirect
description: Delivery QR code to redirect or reschedule a failed package delivery.
subject: FedEx: Delivery attempt failed - Scan to reschedule
text:
FedEx Delivery Notification

Tracking #: 8472 3459 0185
Status: Delivery attempt failed
Reason: No one available to sign
Next attempt: {{.Date}}

Scan the QR code or visit the link to reschedule or redirect your package:
{{.URL}}

If you do not reschedule, the package will be returned to the sender after 3 failed attempts.

FedEx

name: Office WiFi Access QR Code
description: Office WiFi access with scan-to-connect QR code - sophisticated targeted attack.
subject: {{.OrgName}} Guest WiFi credentials updated
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

As part of our quarterly security rotation, {{.OrgName}} has updated the guest WiFi credentials. New credentials will be active starting tomorrow.

To automatically connect your devices:
1. Scan the QR code below with your phone camera
2. Tap 'Connect' when prompted
3. Your device will save the new credentials

Setup link: {{.URL}}

This update affects all devices connected to {{.OrgName}}-Guest and {{.OrgName}}-BYOD networks.

For questions, contact the IT helpdesk.

{{.OrgName}} IT Operations
html:
{{if .OrgLogo}}{{else}}

{{.OrgName}}

{{end}}

📶 WiFi Credentials Updated

Hi {{.FirstName}},

As part of our quarterly security rotation, {{.OrgName}} has updated the guest WiFi credentials. New credentials will be active starting tomorrow.

SCAN TO CONNECT
■▫■
{{.OrgName}}-Guest
  1. Scan the QR code with your phone camera
  2. Tap 'Connect' when prompted
  3. Your device will save the new credentials

Setup Instructions

This update affects all devices connected to {{.OrgName}}-Guest and {{.OrgName}}-BYOD networks.

{{.OrgName}} IT Operations

name: Expense Report Receipt Scan
description: Expense report tool asking user to scan QR to upload receipts - targets finance & sales.
subject: Expense report reminder: scan your receipts before month end
text:
Hi {{.FirstName}},

This is a friendly reminder that your expense report for this month is due by {{.Date}}.

You have 4 pending receipts that need to be uploaded. Scan the QR code below with your Concur mobile app to quickly upload them.

Open mobile app: {{.URL}}

Pending receipts:
- Airfare ($842.00)
- Hotel ($520.00)
- Client dinner ($186.50)
- Taxi ($42.00)

Expense reports not submitted by the deadline will roll over to next month and may delay reimbursement.

SAP Concur
